title: Toasty!
description: This data pack adds Toasty, a companion that will follow you throughout the world of Minecraft!
body:
# Toasty
**This data pack adds Toasty, a companion that will follow you throughout the world of Minecraft!**

Toasty will follow you and any number of other players through all three dimensions. Toasty can break blocks and damage entities by default, but you can turn off destructive mode using `/trigger toastySettings` to open the settings menu for more information. Good luck!

*Remember: You can run, but you can never hide.*

---

*Please note that even though a version is not listed, it may still work. Versions are only listed if they have been tested by me.*

*If you find a problem, please create a [bug report](https://github.com/Stonley890/Toasty/issues/new?assignees=&labels=bug&projects=&template=bug_report.md&title=).*
